item.title: Running Arch Linux on the System76 Oryx Pro 5
item.description: Not too long ago, I picked myself up a System76 Oryx Pro to replace my HP Omen laptop. The Omen, despite being a powerful computer with some pretty high-grade components, had an HP-customized NVIDIA card on their laptop, something that did not play well with Linux NVIDIA drivers. The Oryx Pro was designed by System76, a company marketing itself as a designer of high-quality Linux laptops.

item.title: Notes
item.description: Physics 161 Lecture 25 - Work in 1-D Lecture 26 - Work in Multiple Dimensions Lecture 27 - More on Energy Lecture 28 - Conservation of Momentum Physics and Science Good Theoretical Physicist
